biological_replicate: NSMF knockout mice exhibited increased genomic instability
experimental_design: NSMF regulates the ATR pathway and the replication stress response network
Collectively, these findings demonstrate that NSMF regulates the ATR pathway and the replication stress response network for genome maintenance and cell survival.
factor_value: NSMF deficiency in human and mouse cells also caused increased chromosomal instability.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_technical_replicates: Technical and biological triplicates of each experiment were performed.

number_of_samples: NSMF knockout mice and NSMF deficiency in human and mouse cells indicate biological samples.
